A three-chapter secondary-world fantasy novella set in a coastal city
where memory is currency: every spell costs the caster a specific
remembered moment, surrendered permanently. POV: Kel, a debt-collector
who reclaims surrendered memories from those who cannot pay their
spell-debts. Magic system follows Sanderson's First Law (hard, with
costs) and Third Law (extend before adding new powers).

Three chapters: (1) Kel collects on a mage who cannot pay, (2) the
collected memory turns out to be Kel's own, taken from her years
earlier when she paid for a healing, (3) Kel decides whether to
reclaim her memory at the cost of forgetting her current life.
